label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 8

extraction.one_line_summary: KUSS Sepp attacked 3km from summit of final climb, held gap on descent, finished 7th two seconds behind stage winner ROGLIČ Primož who outsmarted breakaway and GC group in finale.
tactical_patterns: KUSS attacked 3km from summit specifically to take race lead while ROGLIČ preserved energy for stage win.
Jumbo-Visma deployed three riders including VINGEGAARD to chase break, pressuring EVENEPOEL rather than conserving domestiques.
UAE Emirates matched Jumbo numbers with three riders including AYUSO and SOLER, preventing numeric disadvantage in finale.
EVENEPOEL led out final curves but lacked finishing speed, revealing sprint weakness after hard climbs.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: attacked alone 3km from summit after Arinsal win, took race lead while finishing 7th on stage
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: conserved energy while teammate attacked, timed sprint perfectly in sweeping curves to deny AYUSO
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: matched GC group on climbs but led out finale without finishing speed, lost two seconds
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: negative: lost 1m08s and race lead despite only 8s starting margin, cracked on steep percentages
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: contested stage win on mother's birthday, outsprinted everyone except ROGLIČ in finale
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: matched GC group on brutal final climb, same time as ROGLIČ and VINGEGAARD
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: survived crash earlier, finished same time as top GC contenders in reduced group
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: UAE's third rider matching Jumbo numbers on final climb, critical tactical support for AYUSO
